title: PriorityChef Granite Mortar and Pestle Set - 6.1 Inch Natural Stone Molcajete Mexicano for Spices, Seasonings, Pastes - Pestle and Mortar Bowl for Fresh Guacamole, Salsa, Pesto, Small, Grey
description:
About this item
Timeless Tradition Meets Modern Kitchen: Craft your own fresh spices and pastes with the robust PriorityChef Granite Mortar and Pestle Set. Expertly carved from natural granite, this set promises both longevity and style on your countertop.
Fresh Flavors at Your Fingertips: Unleash the full potential of herbs and spices for your homemade guacamole, salsa, and pesto. Our stone grinder bowl releases the essential oils and flavors that pre-packaged products can't match.
Generous Size for All Your Culinary Needs: With a 2 cup capacity and a sturdy 3.9-inch pestle, our heavy-duty guacamole bowl grinder ensures quick, efficient grinding and pounding, making it the go-to tool for any cooking enthusiast.
Effortless Usage and Care: Our granite molcajete mexicano is not only easy to use but also a breeze to clean, ensuring your kitchen adventures are as enjoyable as the meals you prepare.
The Ideal Gift for Food Lovers: Complete with a BPA-free garlic peeler and detailed care instructions, this spice grinder set is the perfect gift for anyone passionate about cooking with fresh ingredients.
reviews_5s:
I bought this to make guacamole and Mofongo. I've enjoyed it thoroughly so far! The weight is very nice and definitely solid. After conditioning the mortar I gave it a try and it made great Mofongo! My only small gripe is occasionally I get a little grittiness from the stone but it's to be expected I believe. Very large size allows me to make a good amount at a time. Awesome price and great value.I like the weight and that it's bigger so I can use it both for mixing my herbs as well as use it for my Guacamole bowl after I'm done mixing it up.Very sturdy mortar. Not too heavy but none of that cheap light weight feel either. I love it. Only thing i didnt like was that its more like 3cup capacity at most but im still happy with it. Make sure to cure it before its first official use.It works! And it looks great in the kitchen.The PriorityChef Granite Mortar and Pestle Set is larger than I thought it would be. It is very heavy and has a large capacity. I am thankful for the added felt feet protectors, so it does not scratch my countertop. It is easy to clean and looks great stored on my counter.The mocajete is very solid and is nice looking. After three rounds of grinding the rice and salt to season the stone I ground some garlic, salt, cumin seed. I roasted garlic, jalapeños, a Serrano pepper,tomatoes, and some onion. Started grinding the onions and garlic first, then added the peppers, finally the tomatoes and salt. First batch was decent, but needed to grind the onions a bit more. Second batch was perfect. May buy the next size for bigger batches in the future.Me gusta mucho es grande y es muy bueno para hacer guacamole o cualquier salsaI love this thing. Admittedly I only bought it because of a single recipe I wanted to get exactly right but it's so nice and useful. However save yourself some grief during the initial cleaning/curing process: the instructions and every online tutorial will say grind rice over and over til clean. And you should. BUT FIRST, soak it in cool water and let it set 30 min-hour, scrub it with heartily with a granite safe brush, rinse it out, and THEN do the rice thing. You won't need to grind rice more than three times to get it clean. I would have saved myself a lot of elbow grease and time if I'd found that tip sooner.I am glad I ordered the larger one. This is a perfect size for guacamole using two avocados.
Quality bowl.
reviews_1s:
I really don’t like this Because it’s very heavy And it’s very gritty. No matter how many times I try to clean it rinse it. I even oiled it and grit keeps coming up every time I go to use it. Even though they say they made it out of granite they didn’t sand it enough or buffet so when you use it, your food has this grit in it.This product has come with some weird stains on it, whoa h look like oil to me. Tried washing but doesn’t go away, I opened the box late after the return window closed. Lessons learnt, open n check packages as soon as they arrive.Company was contacted and offered no resolution .Pestle is way undersized.and design is awful.
Very hard to use .Very unhappy with this product Granite is not very good quality either. Hard to clean.Pestle is 2 inches shorter than advertised. Just a terrible situation .Does not come as advertised. Buyer beware.Missing the pestle, wasn't in the box, just came with the bowl. Description clearly says it's a set. Didn't bother returning the item since my wife tossed the box. The mortar part is a nice bowl though, not mad about the quality. Had to buy my own pestle though so that's pretty lame.Received cracked. Cracks visible only when wet.I don't like you quality 😭😭😭😭The inside of mortar is too smooth so no friction and doesn’t grind things easily. I have to smash very hard with the pastel. I’m thinking to return it. Such a disappointment.
